_comment: fleet delegate fanout examples/fanout.example.json --jobs 2 --dry-run  — the `owns` globs of these units are PAIRWISE DISJOINT, which is why fanout will run them. Make any two overlap and fanout REFUSES the whole manifest with exit 2 and launches nothing: N agents on the same files do not go faster, they overwrite each other (Anthropic, 16 agents, C compiler).

units.task: Make the parser accept trailing commas in argument lists. Add tests under tests/parser/. Do not change the AST node definitions that codegen consumes.
Emit a jump table instead of an if-chain for switch statements with more than 8 dense cases. Add tests under tests/codegen/.
Document the two changes above once they land. Only touch docs/ and README.md.
